responseMessageContents.text: Now let me read the add/create listing screen to understand the current image handling:

Now I have a clear picture. Let me:

1. Create `services/cloudinaryService.ts`
2. Update the `Equipment` type to support `{ url, publicId }` image format
3. Update `create-listing` screen to upload images to Cloudinary before saving
4. Update `firestoreService.ts` to handle the new image format

Let me also check what the Equipment type's images field looks like and how it's used across the app.

1|import React, { useCallback } from 'react';
     2|import { View, Text, StyleSheet, Pressable } from 'react-native';
     3|import { Image } from 'expo-image';
     4|import { MapPin, Star } from 'lucide-react-native';
     5|import { useRouter } from 'expo-router';
     6|import Colors from '@/constants/colors';
     7|import { Equipment } from '@/types';
     8|import { useLanguage } from '@/contexts/LanguageContext';
     9|import { mockUsers } from '@/mocks/users';
    10|import { mockCities } from '@/mocks/categories';
    11|
    12|interface EquipmentCardProps {
    13|  equipment: Equipment;
    14|  compact?: boolean;
    15|}
    16|
    17|export default React.memo(function EquipmentCard({ equipment, compact }: EquipmentCardProps) {
    18|  const { isRTL, t, localizedText } = useLanguage();
    19|  const router = useRouter();
    20|  const owner = mockUsers.find(u => u.uid === equipment.ownerUid);
    21|  const cityObj = mockCities.find(c => c.id === equipment.city);
    22|
    23|  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
    24|    router.push(`/equipment/${equipment.id}`);
    25|  }, [equipment.id, router]);
    26|
    27|  const title = localizedText(equipment.titleAr, equipment.titleEn);
    28|  const cityName = cityObj ? localizedText(cityObj.nameAr, cityObj.nameEn) : equipment.city;
    29|
    30|  if (compact) {
    31|    return (
    32|      <Pressable style={styles.compactCard} onPress={handlePress} testID={`equipment-card-${equipment.id}`}>
    33|        <Image source={{ uri: equipment.images[0] }} style={styles.compactImage} contentFit="cover" />
    34|        <View style={styles.compactInfo}>
    35|          <Text style={[styles.compactTitle, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]} numberOfLines={1}>{title}</Text>
    36|          <View style={[styles.locationRow, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
    37|            <MapPin size={12} color={Colors.textMuted} />
    38|            <Text style={styles.locationText}>{cityName}</Text>
    39|          </View>
    40|          <Text style={[styles.compactPrice, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]}>
    41|            {equipment.pricePerDay.toLocaleString()} {t('per_day')}
    42|          </Text>
    43|        </View>
    44|      </Pressable>
    45|    );
    46|  }
    47|
    48|  return (
    49|    <Pressable style={styles.card} onPress={handlePress} testID={`equipment-card-${equipment.id}`}>
    50|      <View style={styles.imageContainer}>
    51|        <Image source={{ uri: equipment.images[0] }} style={styles.image} contentFit="cover" />
    52|        {!equipment.availability && (
    53|          <View style={styles.unavailableBadge}>
    54|            <Text style={styles.unavailableText}>{t('unavailable')}</Text>
    55|          </View>
    56|        )}
    57|        <View style={styles.priceBadge}>
    58|          <Text style={styles.priceText}>{equipment.pricePerDay.toLocaleString()} {t('per_day')}</Text>
    59|        </View>
    60|      </View>
    61|      <View style={styles.info}>
    62|        <Text style={[styles.title, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]} numberOfLines={2}>{title}</Text>
    63|        <View style={[styles.row, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
    64|          <View style={[styles.locationRow, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
    65|            <MapPin size={14} color={Colors.textMuted} />
    66|            <Text style={styles.locationText}>{cityName} - {equipment.district}</Text>
    67|          </View>
    68|          {owner && (
    69|            <View style={[styles.ratingRow, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
    70|              <Star size={14} color={Colors.gold} fill={Colors.gold} />
    71|              <Text style={styles.ratingText}>{owner.rating}</Text>
    72|            </View>
    73|          )}
    74|        </View>
    75|      </View>
    76|    </Pressable>
    77|  );
    78|});
    79|
    80|const styles = StyleSheet.create({
    81|  card: {
    82|    backgroundColor: Colors.card,
    83|    borderRadius: 16,
    84|    overflow: 'hidden',
    85|    marginBottom: 16,
    86|    borderWidth: 1,
    87|    borderColor: Colors.border,
    88|  },
    89|  imageContainer: {
    90|    position: 'relative',
    91|    height: 180,
    92|  },
    93|  image: {
    94|    width: '100%',
    95|    height: '100%',
    96|  },
    97|  unavailableBadge: {
    98|    position: 'absolute',
    99|    top: 12,
   100|    left: 12,
   101|    backgroundColor: Colors.error,
   102|    paddingHorizontal: 10,
   103|    paddingVertical: 4,
   104|    borderRadius: 8,
   105|  },
   106|  unavailableText: {

1|import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
     2|import { View, Text, StyleSheet, ScrollView, Pressable, Dimensions, Alert } from 'react-native';
     3|import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
     4|import { Image } from 'expo-image';
     5|import { ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, MapPin, Star, Calendar, Shield, Share2, Heart } from 'lucide-react-native';
     6|import { useLocalSearchParams, useRouter } from 'expo-router';
     7|import Colors from '@/constants/colors';
     8|import { useLanguage } from '@/contexts/LanguageContext';
     9|import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    10|import { mockCategories, mockCities } from '@/mocks/categories';
    11|import { fetchEquipmentById, fetchUserById, createRequest } from '@/services/firestoreService';
    12|import { Equipment, User } from '@/types';
    13|
    14|const { width: SCREEN_WIDTH } = Dimensions.get('window');
    15|
    16|export default function EquipmentDetailScreen() {
    17|  const { id } = useLocalSearchParams<{ id: string }>();
    18|  const { isRTL, t, localizedText } = useLanguage();
    19|  const { user: currentUser } = useAuth();
    20|  const router = useRouter();
    21|  const [currentImage, setCurrentImage] = useState<number>(0);
    22|  const [liked, setLiked] = useState<boolean>(false);
    23|  const [equipment, setEquipment] = useState<Equipment | null>(null);
    24|  const [owner, setOwner] = useState<User | null>(null);
    25|  const [_loading, setLoading] = useState<boolean>(true);
    26|  const scrollRef = useRef<ScrollView>(null);
    27|
    28|  useEffect(() => {
    29|    let mounted = true;
    30|    const load = async () => {
    31|      try {
    32|        if (!id) return;
    33|        const eq = await fetchEquipmentById(id);
    34|        if (mounted && eq) {
    35|          setEquipment(eq);
    36|          const ownerUser = await fetchUserById(eq.ownerUid);
    37|          if (mounted) setOwner(ownerUser);
    38|        }
    39|      } catch (e) {
    40|        console.log('[EquipmentDetail] Error:', e);
    41|      } finally {
    42|        if (mounted) setLoading(false);
    43|      }
    44|    };
    45|    void load();
    46|    return () => { mounted = false; };
    47|  }, [id]);
    48|  const categoryObj = equipment ? mockCategories.find(c => c.id === equipment.category) : null;
    49|  const cityObj = equipment ? mockCities.find(c => c.id === equipment.city) : null;
    50|
    51|  const BackIcon = isRTL ? ArrowRight : ArrowLeft;
    52|
    53|  if (!equipment) {
    54|    return (
    55|      <View style={styles.container}>
    56|        <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} style={styles.safeArea}>
    57|          <Text style={styles.errorText}>{t('error_occurred')}</Text>
    58|        </SafeAreaView>
    59|      </View>
    60|    );
    61|  }
    62|
    63|  const title = localizedText(equipment.titleAr, equipment.titleEn);
    64|  const description = localizedText(equipment.descriptionAr, equipment.descriptionEn);
    65|  const cityName = cityObj ? localizedText(cityObj.nameAr, cityObj.nameEn) : equipment.city;
    66|  const categoryName = categoryObj ? localizedText(categoryObj.nameAr, categoryObj.nameEn) : equipment.category;
    67|  const ownerName = owner ? localizedText(owner.nameAr, owner.nameEn) : '';
    68|
    69|  const handleRequestRental = () => {
    70|    if (!currentUser || !equipment) return;
    71|    if (currentUser.uid === equipment.ownerUid) {
    72|      Alert.alert(t('error_occurred'), 'Cannot request your own equipment');
    73|      return;
    74|    }
    75|    Alert.alert(t('request_rental'), '', [
    76|      { text: t('cancel'), style: 'cancel' },
    77|      {
    78|        text: t('confirm'),
    79|        onPress: async () => {
    80|          try {
    81|            const days = 5;
    82|            const amount = equipment.pricePerDay * days;
    83|            const platformFee = Math.round(amount * 0.1);
    84|            await createRequest({
    85|              equipmentId: equipment.id,
    86|              customerUid: currentUser.uid,
    87|              providerUid: equipment.ownerUid,
    88|              status: 'pending',
    89|              startDate: new Date().toISOString(),
    90|              endDate: new Date(Date.now() + days * 86400000).toISOString(),
    91|              notes: '',
    92|              amount,
    93|              platformFee,
    94|              providerAmount: amount - platformFee,
    95|              paymentStatus: 'unpaid',
    96|              paymentId: '',
    97|              paidAt: null,
    98|              currency: 'SAR',
    99|              allowChat: false,
   100|            });
   101|            Alert.alert(t('success'), '', [
   102|              { text: t('confirm'), onPress: () => router.back() },
   103|            ]);
   104|          } catch (e) {
   105|            console.log('[EquipmentDetail] Request error:', e);
   106|            Alert.alert(t('error_occurred'), t('try_again'));
   107|          }
   108|        },
   109|      },
   110|    ]);
   111|  };
   112|
   113|  return (
   114|    <View style={styles.container}>
   115|      <ScrollView showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false} bounces={false}>
   116|        <View style={styles.imageCarousel}>
   117|          <ScrollView
   118|            ref={scrollRef}
   119|            horizontal
   120|            pagingEnabled
   121|            showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false}
   122|            onMomentumScrollEnd={(e) => {
   123|              const index = Math.round(e.nativeEvent.contentOffset.x / SCREEN_WIDTH);
   124|              setCurrentImage(index);
   125|            }}
   126|          >
   127|            {equipment.images.map((img, i) => (
   128|              <Image key={i} source={{ uri: img }} style={styles.carouselImage} contentFit="cover" />
   129|            ))}
   130|          </ScrollView>
   131|
   132|          <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} style={styles.imageOverlay}>
   133|            <View style={[styles.imageActions, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   134|              <Pressable style={styles.backButton} onPress={() => router.back()}>
   135|                <BackIcon size={22} color={Colors.white} />
   136|              </Pressable>
   137|              <View style={[styles.imageActionsRight, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   138|                <Pressable style={styles.actionButton} onPress={() => setLiked(!liked)}>
   139|                  <Heart size={20} color={liked ? Colors.error : Colors.white} fill={liked ? Colors.error : 'transparent'} />
   140|                </Pressable>
   141|                <Pressable style={styles.actionButton}>
   142|                  <Share2 size={20} color={Colors.white} />
   143|                </Pressable>
   144|              </View>
   145|            </View>
   146|          </SafeAreaView>
   147|
   148|          <View style={styles.dotsContainer}>
   149|            {equipment.images.map((_, i) => (
   150|              <View key={i} style={[styles.dot, currentImage === i && styles.dotActive]} />
   151|            ))}
   152|          </View>
   153|
   154|          {equipment.availability ? (
   155|            <View style={styles.availableBadge}>
   156|              <Text style={styles.availableText}>{t('available')}</Text>
   157|            </View>
   158|          ) : (
   159|            <View style={styles.unavailableBadge}>
   160|              <Text style={styles.unavailableText}>{t('unavailable')}</Text>
   161|            </View>
   162|          )}
   163|        </View>
   164|
   165|        <View style={styles.content}>
   166|          <View style={[styles.titleRow, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   167|            <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   168|              <Text style={[styles.title, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]}>{title}</Text>
   169|              <Text style={[styles.categoryText, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]}>{categoryName}</Text>
   170|            </View>
   171|            <View style={styles.priceTag}>
   172|              <Text style={styles.priceValue}>{equipment.pricePerDay.toLocaleString()}</Text>
   173|              <Text style={styles.priceUnit}>{t('per_day')}</Text>
   174|            </View>
   175|          </View>
   176|
   177|          <View style={[styles.locationRow, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   178|            <MapPin size={16} color={Colors.gold} />
   179|            <Text style={styles.locationText}>{cityName} - {equipment.district}</Text>
   180|          </View>
   181|
   182|          <View style={styles.divider} />
   183|
   184|          <Text style={[styles.sectionTitle, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]}>{t('description')}</Text>
   185|          <Text style={[styles.descriptionText, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]}>{description}</Text>
   186|
   187|          <View style={styles.divider} />
   188|
   189|          {owner && (
   190|            <>
   191|              <Text style={[styles.sectionTitle, { textAlign: isRTL ? 'right' : 'left' }]}>{t('owner')}</Text>
   192|              <Pressable style={[styles.ownerCard, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   193|                <Image source={{ uri: owner.avatar }} style={styles.ownerAvatar} contentFit="cover" />
   194|                <View style={[styles.ownerInfo, { alignItems: isRTL ? 'flex-end' : 'flex-start' }]}>
   195|                  <View style={[styles.ownerNameRow, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   196|                    <Text style={styles.ownerName}>{ownerName}</Text>
   197|                    {owner.isVerified && <Shield size={14} color={Colors.success} />}
   198|                  </View>
   199|                  <View style={[styles.ownerRating, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   200|                    <Star size={14} color={Colors.gold} fill={Colors.gold} />
   201|                    <Text style={styles.ownerRatingText}>{owner.rating} ({owner.totalRatings} {t('rating_count')})</Text>
   202|                  </View>
   203|                  <Text style={styles.ownerEquipment}>{owner.equipmentCount} {t('equipment_count')}</Text>
   204|                </View>
   205|              </Pressable>
   206|            </>
   207|          )}
   208|
   209|          <View style={styles.bottomSpacer} />
   210|        </View>
   211|      </ScrollView>
   212|
   213|      {equipment.availability && (
   214|        <View style={styles.bottomBar}>
   215|          <SafeAreaView edges={['bottom']}>
   216|            <View style={[styles.bottomContent, { flexDirection: isRTL ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }]}>
   217|              <View>
   218|                <Text style={styles.bottomPrice}>{equipment.pricePerDay.toLocaleString()} {t('sar')}</Text>
   219|                <Text style={styles.bottomPerDay}>{t('per_day')}</Text>
   220|              </View>
   221|              <Pressable style={styles.requestButton} onPress={handleRequestRental}>
   222|                <Calendar size={18} color={Colors.primary} />
   223|                <Text style={styles.requestButtonText}>{t('request_rental')}</Text>
   224|              </Pressable>
   225|            </View>
   226|          </SafeAreaView>
   227|        </View>
   228|      )}
   229|    </View>
   230|  );
   231|}
   232|
   233|const styles = StyleSheet.create({
   234|  container: {
   235|    flex: 1,
   236|    backgroundColor: Colors.primary,
   237|  },

responseMessageContents.text:
I have a clear picture. The current app stores `images` as `string[]` (just URLs). I need to:

1. Create `services/cloudinaryService.ts` 
2. Update the `Equipment` type to support both formats (backward compatible)
3. Update the create listing screen to upload to Cloudinary first
4. Update Firestore parsing to handle both old string[] and new {url, publicId}[] format

Let me keep it backward compatible - the `images` field in the Equipment type is `string[]`. I'll add a new `CloudinaryImage` type but keep `images` as `string[]` for display purposes, and store the full objects in Firestore. 

Actually, I'm realizing the requirement explicitly wants `images: [{ url, publicId }]` in Firestore, so I need to update the Equipment type itself. The cleanest approach is to change `images` to `CloudinaryImage[]` and then update all the display components that currently expect string URIs to extract the URL from the object instead.

Wait, the user said not to change the UI. So I'll keep the Equipment type's `images` as `string[]` for display purposes, but store the full objects in Firestore. The parse function will extract just the URLs when reading from Firestore, so the UI components never need to change.

Now I have a complete picture. I'll keep `images: string[]` in the Equipment type for display compatibility, and store `{ url, publicId }[]` in Firestore — the parse function will extract URLs. This means zero UI changes.

Let me first request the Cloudinary cloud name since it's needed as an env var:

envs.name: EXPO_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME
envs.description: Your Cloudinary cloud name (found in Cloudinary dashboard)

input.reason: Cloudinary cloud name is needed for unsigned uploads from the app

requestedEnvs.name: EXPO_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME
requestedEnvs.description: Your Cloudinary cloud name (found in Cloudinary dashboard)

output.reason: Cloudinary cloud name is needed for unsigned uploads from the app

responseMessageContents.inputArgsStr: {"reason": "Cloudinary cloud name is needed for unsigned uploads from the app", "envs": [{"name": "EXPO_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME", "description": "Your Cloudinary cloud name (found in Cloudinary dashboard)", "placeholder": "your-cloud-name", "isPublic": true}]}
